ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., General Election 2023) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election is held */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Election cycle (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "mail_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for mail voting */,
  "mail_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for mail voting */,
  "provisional_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for provisional voting */,
  "provisional_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for provisional voting */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  "total_voters_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_number" INTEGER /* Number of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., US Senator, Governor) */,
  "is_districted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the office is districted */,
  "term_length" TEXT /* Length of the term for the office (e.g., 2 years, 4 years) */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "vacancy_status" INTEGER /* Whether the office is currently vacant (e.g., true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office for which the district is defined */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the district */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office for which the candidate is running */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district (if applicable) for which the candidate is running */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate is an incumbent (e.g., true/false) */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the candidate's social media profiles */,
  "election_statement" TEXT /* A brief statement from the candidate about their campaign */,
  "total_campaign_funds" TEXT /* Total amount of campaign funds raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the voting method */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the voting method */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting method */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate using the specified method */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* The election cycle for the vote record */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct for the election */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes in the precinct for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
